question: What can we conclude about the index in the last two years from this chart?

options.A: The chart does not show whether the index in the last two years is equal or different.
options.B: The index is the same for the last two years.
options.C: The index was highest in the first year.
options.D: The index decreased in the final year.

explanation: The y-axis maximum is below the data maximum, so the top bars are truncated and appear equal.
